_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Show remaining time (not end time) on Claude 5h usage slot

steps.description: Add _format_remaining_from_ts helper in orch/llm_usage.py; switch _claude_usage's 5h branch to use it; leave 7d on _format_resets_at; preserve dict shape and percentage values
Review S01: helper correctness, naming, no removal of _format_resets_at, no template edit, no percentage regression, no _cache TTL change

Update test_claude_usage_uses_seven_day_from_cache 5h shape assertion; add unit tests for _format_remaining_from_ts covering all branches (>=1h, <1h, <1m, exact-now, past, zero); keep TestFormatResetsAt and TestFormatReset untouched
Review S03 tests: coverage of all AC branches, isolation, no importlib.reload(orch.config), no live-DB connection
Cross-step global review of S01 + S03 against the design doc and AC1..AC7
QV: Browser verification — Claude 5h footer label renders as 'Xh Ym' / 'Xm', 7d label still wall-clock, percentage unchanged, no console errors
